name: model-scope
description: Turn ANY parameterised model into an interactive explorer: move a slider per parameter and watch the simulation update, shown in views the MODEL defines — no fixed graphic or axis. A Bayesian observer draws prior/likelihood/posterior + a central-tendency curve + prior updating; a neuron draws a trace + raster + f–I curve; a decision model animates a trajectory + RT histogram; a POMDP/saccade/RL/population model draws whatever fits. Schema-driven sliders + a simulate()→views contract + a small plotting helper, no build step.
